THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLETCHER, LLOYD HAMMER, CHRISTOPHER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1326-B MCALLISTER STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, STAYED UNTIL JUL-01-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS & FEES, MUTUAL RELEASE. PLTF TO RETAIN SECURITY DEPOSIT. IF DFTS VACATE TIMELY, PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT/DMGS. IF NOT, OR IF PREM NOT LEFT BROOM CLEAN & KEYS RETURNED, PLTF TO HAVE AMENDED JUDGMNT FOR $1445 BACK RENT, DMGS OF $20/DAY FROM 6/1; $700 ATNY FEES& $225 COSTS.
